rules: Speed is quality, not fatigue — take full recovery between reps; stop the series when sharpness drops.
Respect the day's effort cap; never drift into max-velocity on acceleration days.
Any hamstring or soft-tissue niggle at Monitor or above → modify or stop. The season is the priority.
Full warm-up before every sprint effort — no cold high-intensity work.
Log honestly, on the day — the plan adapts to real data, not intended data.
warmup: Jog 5 min → leg swings, hip openers, walking lunges → drills 2×20m (A-march, A-skip, B-skip, ankling, bounds) → 2 build-ups 40–50m to ~75–80% → pogos 2×10 + wall-drive 2×10/leg. (~20 min)
cooldown: Walk 5 min → hamstring / quad / calf stretch → foam roll 5 min.

sessions.sprint: 6×20m @≤90%, 3-pt/standing start, walk-back + 90s. Cap ≤30m, never max-V.
sessions.gym: Back squat 3×5 @70% (84 kg) (RPE ≤8, 3s down, explode up) · B-stance RDL (L fwd) 3+1×8–10 · Nordic eccentric, band-assisted 2×4 (s1) · trunk 2×3.
